signals.title: Verenigd Koninkrijk verlaagt kapitaalbuffers voor stablecoins onder MiCA-niveau
signals.summary: UK to lower stablecoin capital buffers, undercutting EU's MiCA requirements

signals.title: Breez lanceert Bitcoin-naar-stablecoin-betalingen op meer dan 30 blockchains
signals.summary: The new SDK feature lets developers route payments from Bitcoin balances to recipients in USDC and USDT without requiring users to hold stablecoins.

signals.title: EBA publiceert ontwerpmethodologie voor boeterollen onder MiCA
signals.summary: ​The European Banking Authority (EBA) published today a Consultation Paper with a draft methodology for setting fines in its role as supervisor under MiCA. The objective is to ensure that fines imposed on issuers of significant crypto-assets are consistent, proportionate and transparent, and effectively support compliance with the regulatory framework.

signals.title: Visa, Stripe, Coinbase stappen in Open USD stablecoin
signals.summary: Expected to launch later this year, Open Standard said businesses will be able to mint and redeem Open USD without fees or volume limits.

signals.title: OKX AI lanceert marktplaats waar agenten werk vinden en in stablecoins betaald krijgen
signals.summary: “Think Upwork for Agents with our fintech infrastructure and 150M scale in the background," an OKX rep said.

signals.title: Circle daalt 8% na steun voor rivaliserende stablecoin-netwerk
signals.summary: Circle slides 8% as Stripe, Coinbase and BlackRock back rival stablecoin network

signals.title: MetaMask introduceert Money Account met stablecoin-rendement en betalingen
signals.summary: MetaMask launches Money Account with stablecoin yield and spending in one wallet

signals.title: MetaMask lanceert rentespaarrekening voor mUSD-stablecoin met kaartuitgaven
signals.summary: MetaMask launches Money Account it says offers up to 4% variable APY on mUSD stablecoin balances and card spending, with DeFi-powered yield via vaults, excluding the UK and EU.
